message.content:
Very thoroughly search the codebase at D:\cursor-projects\oa\oa-all for anything related to AIChat account management. Look for:

1. Code that calls the AIChat API (aichat.xinyoudi.com, test-aichi.xinyoudi.com)
2. RSA encryption of nicknames/emails for AIChat
3. Permission pass/approval flow for AIChat
4. Any code related to "permission/pass" or "permission/list" endpoints
5. Any existing resignation/离职 handling logic that interacts with external systems
6. client_id and client_secret configuration for AIChat
7. Any code related to "aichat" keyword

Search across all file types including Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, Python, XML, YAML, properties files.

Report back the full file paths, relevant code snippets, and how the current AIChat integration works.
